examples: The book has enjoyed a success unparalleled in recent publishing history.
The Renaissance was an epoch of unparalleled cultural achievement.
Could we render this inimitable picture properly, then would everybody exclaim, "Beautiful, unparalleled Italy!"
Each device offers the unparalleled ability to charge USB devices and daisy chain multiple speakers together.
He accused the previous Labour government of leaking information to the media on an "unparalleled scale".
